text.title: Web Scraping Agentic Workflow Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure from "we want to scrape source X" to "today's raw/ is ready for the curated stage". Each step has a decision-gate that blocks progression.

step.name: robots-and-probe
step.action: Fetch robots.txt; cache for the run. Run `curl -I` + small GET on the canonical URL. Classify render_mode ∈ {ssr, js, managed}.
step.decision-gate: If allowed=false — ABORT with verdict block-robots-disallow.

step.name: tool-selection
step.action: Pick tool per r2 mapping: ssr → httpx-selectolax; js → playwright; managed → firecrawl or jina-reader.
step.decision-gate: Mismatch is rejected by the validator.

step.name: extract
step.action: Extract rows with role/text/structural locators only. NO class-name guessing. Use pagination per the source layout (next-button OR infinite-scroll OR load-more); see `web-scraping-pagination`.
step.decision-gate: If rows_seen=0 after extraction AND raw HTML has listing items — STOP, fix locators.

step.name: validate
step.action: Validate each row; valid → main JSONL; invalid → `invalid/<source>.jsonl` with validation error.
step.decision-gate: If rows_valid / rows_seen < 0.9 — verdict block-validation-low; do not promote.

step.name: store
step.action: Write to `raw/YYYY-MM-DD/<source>.jsonl`. Compress and store raw HTML snapshot at `raw/YYYY-MM-DD/<source>.html.gz`.
step.decision-gate: If write fails — retry with backoff; if 3 retries fail, abort the run.

step.name: drift-check
step.action: Compute drift_score = % of fields with ≥80% prior-run presence that fell below 80% today. If drift_score > 5 — file human-review issue and set verdict block-drift-high.
step.decision-gate: verdict=promote only when drift_score ≤ 5 AND rows_valid ratio ≥ 0.9.

text.reference: Prompt skeleton that forces this order on the agent.
Report skeleton authors emit at end-of-run.
